channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Left oustide garage, 18th March
item.description:
Huge wooden box black sacks - tins with oil container's for cooking carpet general household stuff suitcase
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Harcourt Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on public footway fronting the recycling containers in Shortlands Station Car park Shortlands Rd, Shortlands, 18th March
item.description:
Dog poo on public footway fronting the recycling containers in Shortlands Station Car park Shortlands Rd, Shortlands. 11am today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere..., 18th March
item.description:
Litter everywhere...

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Baydon Court, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes in White Oak Gardens, 18th March
item.description:
Road in poor condition and large holes across the carriageway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, White Oak Gardens, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 x bags of rubbish Bristow Rd/Pickford Lane B'Heath, 18th March
item.description:
4 x bags of rubbish Bristow Rd/Pickford Lane B'Heath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young tree fallen over, 18th March
item.description:
Young tree needs to be secured and lifted back up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25B, Chelsfield Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped and scattered, 18th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped and being scattered as opened by foxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hyde Vale, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Packaging dumped, 18th March
item.description:
Packaging dumped in front of our building blocking shutters

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidworth Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog attack, 18th March
item.description:
Another dog attack by the same dog. This is the 5th time and if this dog is not destroyed someone is going to be killed. THIS IS URGENT. Thankfully today 5 builders were there to wrestle the dog off the person and dog. You need to act now! It is owned by 17 Leamington Avenue and they couldn’t care less!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leamington Avenue, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 18th March
item.description:
Please remove flytip of old fire place surround from corner of Kersey gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kersey Gardens, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked pavement, 18th March
item.description:
The customers of Salt Fink and N5 Kitchen block the pavement. Tables and chairs take over half the pavement, making it difficult for wheelchair users and just pedestrians to get past.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mountgrove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found, 18th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council Slade Court, rubbish bins area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walm Lane, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Dead squirrel in the road. Guts spilling out and getting run over repeatedly, 18th March
item.description:
There is a dead squirrel in the road. Cars keep driving over it and its guts are spilling out. It’s disgusting. Please clean it up asap before more of it spreads arcross the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal dumping of mattresses and household waste on pavement, 18th March
item.description:
There is illegal dumping on the pavement, including mattresses and household waste, creating a health and safety hazard. Please arrange for urgent removal and investigate the issue to prevent further dumping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped, 18th March
item.description:
Various items incl from carpet fitters at no 3 !

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Eastern Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping by travelodge in belvedere, 18th March
item.description:
There is mattresses and a wardrobe thats been fly tipped by the travelodge in belvedere on clydesdale way. This is on the grass area and has been there for around 4 days. Please can this be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clydesdale Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basal growth, 18th March
item.description:
Basal growth needs pruning to keep pathways clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wivenhoe Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping on Truman’s Road, 18th March
item.description:
Truman’s Road is becoming a total dumping ground, it seems something new is fly tipped on a weekly, if not daily occurrence. This bed frame has been obstructing the pavement for several days and people are adding rubbish to it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags ripped open, rubbish overflowing Truman’s Road, 18th March
item.description:
As usual, bin bags were piled high before being collected yesterday (Tuesday) but these bags were left behind and have since been ripped open, I imagine by foxes etc., and the rubbish is now flowing onto the pavement. Same issue with recycling, it’s piled.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping corner of Alconbury and Northwold Roads., 18th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping corner of Alconbury and Northwold Roads.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
